metadata.title: Discrete Frequencies in DFT
metadata.author: Axono
metadata.description: Article explaining discrete frequencies in DFT

content.text: DFTs are defined on a discrete set of frequency bins, where k is the bin number.
For a period of length N, the discrete frequencies are defined by the frequencies with an integer number of complete cycles within the period.
The fundamental frequency completes 1 cycle within the period:
The following discrete frequencies are therefore integer multiples of the fundamental frequency:
